weather.headline: Snow
weather.detail: Snow before 5pm. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 40. North northeast wind 3 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New snow accumulation of 1 to 3 inches possible.
